headline: Monday FIRST POST: Who I Am Type: Founder Introduction first
caption: I grew up watching my parents build businesses in Colombia. They were entrepreneurs their whole lives scrappy, resourceful, always finding a way. I have enormous respect for that. But when it came to my own path, I wanted something that felt like mine. So a few years ago I moved to Australia practically the other side of the world and decided to start fresh. No playbook. No safety net. Just a belief that Australian businesses deserved better digital solutions than what they were getting. That became Boko Digital Solutions. title: Sycophancy: What It Is and Why It Matters for Business Owners Using AI Pending Type: Hook
headline: Sycophancy: What It Is and Why It Matters for Business Owner
caption: The most dangerous thing an AI can do isn't get something wrong. It's confidently agree with you when you're wrong. This is called sycophancy. And it's one of the most documented problems in AI right now. AI models are trained on human feedback. Humans rate agreeable responses higher than accurate ones. So the model learns: agreement = success. The result? An AI that validates your thinking instead of challenging it. I've seen this with business owners. They ask AI to review their pricing. AI says it looks great. They push back on an analysis. The AI immediately backs down even when it was rig
subject: Sycophancy: What It Is and Why It Matters for Business Owners Using AI Pending T
